top_signals.title: Iran’s Guards used UAE company to buy military satellite equipment
top_signals.summary: Records seen by FT show Tehran used procurement network in Gulf state that it later hit with missiles and drones
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The power struggle in the world’s narrow seas
top_signals.summary: As the Strait of Hormuz crisis grips the global economy, nations are vying to secure other vulnerable waterways
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Please stop talking about Gen Z in the office
top_signals.summary: Mindless generational labels don’t help at a time when the workplace is one of the few places where young and old mix
